title: UNIGLOVES GS0083 Examination Gloves, Blue Vinyl-Powder Free, Medium, Set of 100 (Pack of 2)
features: The information below applies to each unit in the pack
Unicare Vinyl are latex-free, industrial-grade, powder-free single-use gloves that can be used across a range of industries, including cleaning and food processing
High-quality polyvinyl chloride (PVC) offers a strong latex-free, good-value alternative with a low-friction inner polymer coating for smooth donning. Tapered at the wrist to better fit your hand
Touchscreen-compatible for your convenience, the medium-weight construction provides a balance of strength and sensitivity and a safe option for people with latex allergies
An ambidextrous fit that makes these gloves easy to put on when you’re in a hurry; the beaded cuff offers extra strength during donning and prevents liquid roll back
Industrial-grade disposable gloves with a pinhole AQL of 4.0. Tested for compliance to EN420 (protective gloves - general requirements), and EN1186 (food safe (not for use with fatty foods))
